overview.description: The Simplify High Yield ETF (CDX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund is a fund-of-funds that invests in US high-yield bond ETFs with different maturities. It also provides a credit hedge overlay, which may contain S&P 500 Index (SPX) puts. CDX was launched on Feb 14, 2022 and is issued by Simplify.

data.title: New Fund Name for the Simplify High Yield PLUS Credit Hedge ETF (CDX)
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simplify Asset Management has announced that the Simplify High Yield PLUS Credit Hedge ETF (NYSE Arca: CDX) has been renamed Simplify High Yield ETF.
